title: Python launch configuration
description: BL-113 reference launch-config form for the debugpy DAP adapter. The shell reads this from `metadata.launch_config_schema` on the host-emitted `DapAdapterEntry` and renders a typed form whose values are passed verbatim as `launch` request arguments. Field set is the minimum the upstream `debugpy.adapter` recognises.

program.title: Program
program.description: Absolute path to the Python script to debug.

args.title: Arguments
args.description: argv tail passed to the script.

cwd.title: Working directory
cwd.description: Directory the script runs in. Defaults to the program's parent.

stopOnEntry.title: Stop on entry
stopOnEntry.description: Pause at the script's first line so breakpoints set before launch hit deterministically.

justMyCode.title: Just my code
justMyCode.description: Skip stepping into library / site-packages frames.
